enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Saturday Fever'?

'Saturday Fever' conveys the excitement and energy of partying, encouraging listeners to let loose and enjoy life.

How does this song fit into the plot of the movie?

The song captures a lively party scene in Naveena Saraswathi Sabatham, reflecting the carefree spirit of the characters.

Who are the singers of 'Saturday Fever'?

The song features a unique collaboration by Sayanora Phillip, UV Rap, and Vijay Prakash.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for 'Saturday Fever' was composed by Prem Kumar, known for his catchy and vibrant tunes.

When was 'Saturday Fever' released?

'Saturday Fever' was released on November 28, 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: 'Saturday Fever' is a lively dance number that encapsulates the joy and excitement of partying with friends. The song's upbeat tempo and catchy lyrics invite listeners to embrace the weekend spirit and recharge their energy. Set against the backdrop of Naveena Saraswathi Sabatham, it enhances the film's celebratory moments, making it a perfect anthem for any festive occasion. The collaboration of talented singers adds a dynamic flair, ensuring it resonates with audiences looking for a fun escape.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Saturday Fever from Naveena Saraswathi Sabatham is an electrifying anthem that perfectly captures the essence of a vibrant party atmosphere. With a unique collaboration between Sayanora Phillip, UV Rap, and Vijay Prakash, this track is sure to get you on your feet. The infectious beats and lively lyrics make it a must-listen for anyone looking to elevate their mood!
stanzaMeanings: Saturday fever, you are like an awesome laser, the battery of my heart is draining. Did you come here to recharge? Come, you are the one I was waiting for.
Hey, steady buddy, lift your spirits for a party. You need to lighten up and enjoy this party.
Hey, in my world, you are a devil. Look at this party, your charm is quite mischievous.
You are like an American dollar, dancing like a Jamaican. You drink like an Irish girl, come, come, come, come...
Our party hall is lively, with sunlight and beams of light. You are like a star, ha ha, you are the singer, and for worries, just give a middle finger.
Hey, steady buddy, lift your spirits for a party. You need to lighten up and enjoy this party.
Oh baby! Oh baby!! Let's have a party.
When kids are born, it's a party. When you celebrate, it's a full-on party.
If you win in a match, it's a party. If you fix a spot, it's still a party. If there's money, it's always party time.
If you take a history book, it will also be a party. If you do, names will change, don't let it be a war.
If you read a geography book, it will also be a party. If you do, names will change, don't let it be about beer.
Like a cocktail, we will mix together. We will add ice cubes on top, come on, let's go.
With the speed of a red light, come and see. Oh, when I see you, my heart races...
Hey, steady buddy, lift your spirits for a party. You need to lighten up and enjoy this party.
When a girlfriend comes, it's a party. Even if she dumps you, it's still a diverse party.
Hey, breezy beach, hey, boozy party, surfing on a tsunami, it's a party.
If you take money and toss it, everything will be a party. Don't look at the flowers, just enjoy the fun.
There's no need for reasons, just enjoy the party. Don't ask me, just enjoy yourself.
In the 60s, we came to party. We won't stop until Saturday, dreaming of a party, come on, let's live together.
Come on, oh, when I see you, my heart races...
Hey, steady buddy, lift your spirits for a party. You need to lighten up and enjoy this party.
Hey, in my world, you are a devil. Look at this party, your charm is quite mischievous.
